message:
fix: drop id from ORDER BY in GetAllEventsSince UNION ALL query (PR #2691)

Dolt's query planner attempts to cast UUID char(36) values to double
when sorting a UNION ALL result set by the id column. This produces
"+Inf is not a valid value for double" errors that break convoy
event polling in the Gas Town daemon.

The id column (UUID v7) doesn't need to participate in sorting here -
created_at provides sufficient chronological ordering for event polling.

Co-Authored-By: Olof Johansson <olof@lixom.net>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
